_metadata.description: Per-school School Site Council meeting agendas and minutes. Meeting documents are published to R2 under documents/ssc/{school}/{year}/ and served from data.rcsd.info.
_metadata.source: Materials shared publicly by each school's SSC. Orion 2025-26: Google Drive folder https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1ZM8gRkBjer18QwlvNG_pEKOYmgFmwRZa
_metadata.extractionMethod: Source .docx files converted to PDF via pandoc → HTML → Chromium (scripts/convert-ssc-docs.mjs). Source-provided PDFs are copied through unchanged.
